heading: Omitted
label: 1750aa to 1750jj Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1750aa, , , contained a declaration of policy for voluntary home mortgage credit.act Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 649, title VI, § 60168 Stat. 637Section 1750bb, acts , title VI, § 602, ; , , , defined “Insured or guaranteed mortgage loan”, “Private financing institutions”, “Administrator”, and “State”.Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 64968 Stat. 637Pub. L. 85–857, § 13(s)(1)72 Stat. 1266Sept. 2, 1958Section 1750cc, acts , title VI, § 603, ; , title I, § 109(a)(3), , provided for establishment and composition of National Voluntary Mortgage Credit Extension Committee.Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 64968 Stat. 637Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 78369 Stat. 640Section 1750dd, , , provided for establishment, composition, and organization of regional subcommittees of National Voluntary Mortgage Credit Extension Committee.act Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 649, title VI, § 60468 Stat. 638Section 1750ee, , , set forth general functions of National Committee and regional subcommittees.act Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 649, title VI, § 60568 Stat. 638Section 1750ff, , , authorized National Committee to study and review demand and supply of funds for residential mortgage loans, to receive reports from and correlate the activities of regional subcommittees to report periodically to Commissioner of Federal Housing Administration and Administrator of Veterans’ Affairs, to maintain liaison with State and local government housing officials, and to submit reports to Congress.act Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 649, title VI, § 60668 Stat. 638Section 1750gg, acts , title VI, § 607, ; , , , set forth the functions, powers, and duties of regional subcommittees.Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 64968 Stat. 639Pub. L. 85–857, § 13(s)(1)72 Stat. 1266Sept. 2, 1958Section 1750hh, , , authorized Administrator, after consultation with National Committee, to issue general rules and procedures for implementation of this subchapter and functioning of regional subcommittees.act Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 649, title VI, § 60868 Stat. 640Section 1750ii, , , exempted laws promulgated pursuant to this subchapter from prohibitions of antitrust laws or Federal Trade Commission Act of United States, provided for status of members of National Committee or any of regional subcommittees, and provided for an office, staff assistance and expenses of members.act Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 649, title VI, § 60968 Stat. 640Section 1750jj, acts , title VI, § 610, ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , provided that, unless Congress authorized for an earlier termination, this subchapter and all authority conferred hereunder was to terminate at close of .Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 64968 Stat. 640Pub.
